arts.ttl: Portsmouth boosted by return of 2 key players - and newcomer on the bench - for Burnley clash
arts.sum: Rob Atkinson has returned to strengthen Pompey’s side for the tough clash with Burnley.

arts.ttl: Burnley team news vs Portsmouth as two key men miss out - but Manuel Benson returns
arts.sum: Burnley are without captain Josh Brownhill for today’s trip to Portsmouth – but Scott Parker is boosted by the return of Manuel Benson on the bench.

arts.ttl: Manager insists player’s move to Burnley isn’t a ‘relief’ – No issues as transfer finalised
arts.sum: Sporting Club de Portugal manager Rui Borges has insisted that he has no problem with Marcus Edwards as he gears up to join Burnley. Record cover comments from the Sporting boss today on Edwards, who appears to be on the verge of joining Burnley on loan. arts.ttl: 'Final stages': Burnley linked with January swoop for exciting Sporting winger Marcus Edwards
arts.sum: Burnley could be about to clinch an exciting January transfer window swoop for Sporting winger Marcus Edwards.

arts.ttl: LIVE Portsmouth v Burnley: build-up, team news and live updates from Fratton Park
arts.sum: Pompey return to action against the defensive might of promotion chasers Burnley today.

arts.ttl: Burnley step ahead of Sunderland in transfer battle – Negotiations ‘well underway’ over loan deal
arts.sum: Marcus Edwards is ‘in the process’ of finalising his exit from Sporting Club de Portugal and will join Burnley. That’s according to Record, who report that ‘negotiations are well underway’ between Burnley and Sporting about a move. arts.ttl: Sheffield United v Portsmouth to get the Cosm shared reality treatment in Los Angeles and Dallas
arts.sum: Pompey and Sheffield United fans based in the USA are set for a unique treat next Saturday.

arts.ttl: Auxerre predicted XI v Monaco: Han-Noah Massengo to start against his formative club
arts.sum: Han-Noah Massengo, on loan at AJ Auxerre from Burnley, is expected to start against his formative club, AS Monaco, on Saturday evening. With Kévin Danois still out for Auxerre, Massengo,…

arts.ttl: Portsmouth rivals eye late striker transfer as Cardiff and Hull battle for defender and Derby 'agree £4m' fee for centre-back
arts.sum: Pompey fans were treated to two new signings on Friday as the transfer window closes.

arts.ttl: Scott Parker makes 'real force' Portsmouth claim ahead of Burnley's trip to Fratton Park
arts.sum: Scott Parker is expecting Portsmouth to go toe-to-toe with his Burnley side when they make the long trip to Fratton Park today.
